data.title: Chamonix Partners Launches Inaugural Project Finance CLO at $306.8 Million, Driving Global Market Infrastructure Investment
data.description: Chamonix Partners Capital Management unveiled the finalization of its first project finance Collateralized Loan Obligation named Chamonix Infrastructure Funding I, LLC (CPIF 2026-1A). The CLO, backed by $304 million, marks a significant milestone for the company.

data.title: Tech workers are maxing out A.I. use at companies, competing to show their usage. Resulting in large bills.
data.description: At several companies, employees engage in a competition using leaderboards to showcase their utilization of artificial intelligence (A.I.). This practice has led to substantial expenses being incurred by participants in the competition.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Koskinen
data.description: In Helsinki, Finland on March 20, 2026, a press release from Nordea Bank Abp announces that one of its Group Leadership Team members, Jussi Koskinen, has recently acquired a total of 22,613 shares in the company. This transaction was disclosed at 16:00 EET on the same day as part of the Managers' transactions protocol.

data.title: Signing of Primary Dealer Agreements
data.description: Today, the Government Debt Management, acting on behalf of the Treasury, finalized agreements with primary dealers related to the issuance and market making of Treasury securities. The primary goal of these agreements is to ensure the Treasury's continual access to funding and improve price discovery in the secondary market for Treasury securities. Additionally, the agreements aim to support the creation of a robust system for benchmark issues in Iceland.

data.title: Alamos Gold Files Technical Report for the Island Gold District Expansion
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Alamos Gold Inc. disclosed that they submitted a technical report for the Expansion Study conducted at the Island Gold District operation in Ontario, Canada. The company trades under the symbols TSX:AGI and NYSE:AGI. This news signifies a significant step in the development of the operation located in Ontario, indicating potential growth and advancements in the mining sector in the region.

data.title: LDO price to hit $0.33 by April 2026. Currently at $0.30 with conflicting signals: potential rise to $0.33, but downside risk to $0.28.
data.description: The digital currency LDO is currently trading at $0.30, showing mixed signals in the market. According to technical analysis, there is a prospect of a breakout towards the $0.33 resistance level. However, the bearish MACD indicator is indicating a downside risk, potentially leading to a drop to the $0.28 support levels.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Persson
data.description: In Helsinki on March 20, 2026, a member of the Nordea Group Leadership Team, Martin Persson, acquired a total of 31,146 shares in Nordea Bank Abp as disclosed under the Market Abuse Regulation. This transaction was reported in compliance with Article 19 of the EU Market Abuse Regulation.

data.title: Major security upgrade: Mews makes Single Sign-On free for all customers amid rising cyber threats
data.description: In a recent development, hotels are set to benefit from enhanced centralized identity control and improved security measures without any extra fees. Mews, a leading operating system for the hospitality industry, has revealed that they are offering Single Sign-On (SSO) capabilities to all their customers at no additional cost. This enhancement provides a crucial layer of protection for hotels in managing user access and ensuring data security. The announcement, made on March 20, 2026 in Amsterdam, signifies a significant step towards bolstering the cybersecurity of hotels worldwide.

data.title: HBAR price aims $0.10 by April '26. Trading at $0.09, neutral RSI 42.56 indicates chance for $0.10 within 4-6 weeks amid consolidation.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Hedera (HBAR) is currently trading at $0.09 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading at 42.56. Analysts are predicting a possible price breakout to reach the resistance level of $0.10 in the next 4-6 weeks as the currency undergoes a consolidation phase.

data.title: Intuitive Machines Analysts Increase Their Forecasts After Q4 Results
data.description: Intuitive Machines, Inc. (NASDAQ: LUNR) released disappointing fourth-quarter sales figures, with revenue totaling $44.78 million, falling short of the expected $53.68 million. CEO Steve Altemus highlighted 2025 as a pivotal year for the company due to significant achievements such as successfully completing its second lunar mission, venturing into national security space initiatives, and acquiring KinetX Aerospace and Lanteris Space Systems to enhance scalability and increase growth prospects. Intuitive Machines is optimistic about... (continued details can be found on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Why Milestone Pharma Stock Is Taking A Dive Today
data.description: Shares of Milestone Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: MIST) are plummeting today after the company announced a delay in the European approval process for its main drug. The European Medicines Agency accepted the marketing application for etripamil in treating paroxysmal supraventricular tachycardia (PSVT) in January. This application was supported by the same global data package that led to FDA approval in December 2025. PSVT is a type of arrhythmia characterized by sudden bursts of rapid, regular heart rates (120–230 bpm). The anticipated decision timeline has been extended to the first half of 2027, as opposed to the initial expectation of the first quarter of 2027. Tachymist has been conditionally approved as the European brand name for the drug. The company is experiencing a significant drop in its stock value due to this development.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Smith
data.description: On March 20, 2026, at 16:00 EET in Helsinki, Nordea Bank Abp released a statement regarding managers' transactions. Ian Smith, Nordea's Chief Financial Officer, acquired a total of 31,063 shares in the company. This information was disclosed following a notification received under the Market Abuse regulations.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Gadeberg
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp announced a stock exchange release regarding managers' transactions at 16.00 EET. Christina Gadeberg, a member of the Nordea Group Leadership Team, disclosed receiving a total of 16,889 shares in Nordea Bank Abp as per the notification.
